common-arm64-candidates.description: Generic boot-only candidate sweep for arm64 Android kernels.

common-mtk-candidates.description: Experimental MTK boot-only candidate sweep. Seeded from Redmi K80 Ultra preload.so analysis; exact boot/kernel still required.
common-mtk-candidates.route_notes: MTK sample p0_data_alias delta is 0x3f80000000, implying P0_KERNEL_PHYS_LOAD=0x4000000000 with P0_PHYS_OFFSET=0x80000000. Uses loose kallsyms marker scan hotfix.

oneplus15r-cph2769-os16.0.8.300.description: OnePlus 15R / CPH2769 / OxygenOS 16.0.8.300 boot.img profile, generated from boot-only candidates then verified against the previous working payload.
oneplus15r-cph2769-os16.0.8.300.route_notes: x-spy pselect route validates with PSELECT_WAITER_WORD_SHIFT=2. Only target.h/profile changes are needed for this build.

xiaomi-popsicle-family.description: x-spy upstream Xiaomi 17/Pro/Ultra popsicle family baseline.

redmi-turbo5max-bootimg.description: Redmi Turbo 5 Max boot.img profile notes from the local AyuGram Desktop boot.img sample.
redmi-turbo5max-bootimg.route_notes: Boot offsets generate, but x-spy pselect route gives shift=6 and does not fit nfds=320; use a PR22-style route/object rewrite before running on this sample.
